basic_details.job_title: DMHS DNH and Daman & Diu Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 42 Panchakarma Technician, Yoga Instructor Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Directorate of Medical & Health Services (DMHS DNH and Daman & Diu)
basic_details.short_information: Directorate of Medical & Health Services (DMHS DNH and Daman & Diu) Panchakarma Technician, Yoga Instructor Notification 2026 has been released on the official website ddd.gov.in. A total of 42 vacancies have been announced through the DMHS DNH and Daman & Diu Panchakarma Technician, Yoga Instructor Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Diploma/Certificate course in Panchakarma, Diploma in Yoga Science (D.Y.Sc.) or Diploma in Yoga Therapy (DYT)
qualification.details: Panchakarma Technician (Senior): Diploma/Certificate course in Panchakarma with 10-years experience in Panchakarma Techniques at a recognized Ayurveda Institute. Panchakarma Technician (Medium): Diploma/Certificate course in Panchakarma with 05-years experience in Panchakarma Techniques at a recognized Ayurveda Institute. Panchakarma Technician (Junior): Diploma/Certificate course in Panchakarma. Yoga Instructor: Diploma in Yoga Science (D.Y.Sc.) or Diploma in Yoga Therapy (DYT).

selection_process: Selection will be based on interviews only.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DMHS DNH and Daman & Diu Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.dnh.gov.in, www.vbch.dnh.nic.in, https://ddd.gov.in/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 16-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DMHS DNH and Daman & Diu Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the DMHS DNH and Daman & Diu Recruitment 2026 is 16-05-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Panchakarma Technician posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 42 vacancies announced for Panchakarma Technician and Yoga Instructor posts in the DMHS DNH and Daman & Diu Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their applications via post or email.

faq.question: Q4. What are the essential qualifications for the Panchakarma Technician (Junior) post?
faq.answer: The essential qualification for the Panchakarma Technician (Junior) post is a Diploma/Certificate course in Panchakarma.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for a Panchakarma Technician (Senior) post?
faq.answer: The consolidated pay for a Panchakarma Technician (Senior) post is Rs. 37,500/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for these posts will be based solely on interviews.

faq.question: Q7. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: You can download the application form from the official websites: www.dnh.gov.in, www.vbch.dnh.nic.in, or https://ddd.gov.in/.

faq.question: Q8. What is the official website for DMHS DNH and Daman & Diu?
faq.answer: The official websites are www.dnh.gov.in, www.vbch.dnh.nic.in, and https://ddd.gov.in/.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The job type for these positions is contractual.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is DMHS/NAM/DNH&DD/Manpower Ayu. Hosp./2026-27/79/1216.
